% Generated preamble -- regenerated every run. Do not edit; edit main.tex instead.
\documentclass[12pt]{iopart}
% iopart.cls unconditionally defines its own `equation*`/`endequation*`,
% which collides with amsmath's own definition ("Command \equation* already
% defined") -- undefine the class's versions first so amsmath can define its
% own. Standard community fix; see VENDOR_LICENSE.txt.
\expandafter\let\csname equation*\endcsname\relax
\expandafter\let\csname endequation*\endcsname\relax
\usepackage{amsmath}
\usepackage{amssymb}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{bm}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage[colorlinks=true,linkcolor=blue,citecolor=blue,urlcolor=blue]{hyperref}
\bibliographystyle{iopart-num}
